headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “No kitty that's my pretty good box!"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-05-04)

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: STOP MEOWING OSCAR
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.

headlines.h: Weather Alert: Bro is about to lose all 9 lives at once
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
